response.justification: While Sarah is a highly experienced software engineer with strong practices in TDD, CI/CD, and web infrastructure, she falls significantly short on the core technical requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, possessing less than a year of professional C++ experience. Furthermore, her background leans heavily toward web applications, Node.js, and DLang, rather than the low-level cloud compute, storage, or hardware architecture experience expected for this Technical Lead role.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience with a strong focus on testing, TDD, and CI/CD best practices.
Demonstrated leadership and mentoring abilities through organizing technical workshops, dojos, and holding Staff-level positions.
Experience building high-throughput microservices and event-driven platforms, such as handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby.
concerns: Severely lacks the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience, having only about 7 months of professional exposure.
Lacks deep, large-scale experience in low-level cloud compute technologies, storage, and hardware architecture.
Primary technology stack favors JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which does not align well with the systems-level focus of the role.
